name: CROP — PA DOS Entity Status Checker

parameters.content:
## PA DOS Entity Status Checker

Runs daily at 7 AM. For each active client, queries the PA DOS business entity search and verifies current status.
Alerts if status changed (dissolved, forfeited, merged, etc.)

**HOW IT WORKS:**
PA DOS has a public search at https://file.dos.pa.gov/search/business
This workflow sends HTTP requests to the search endpoint, parses the response,
and compares against the last known status in AiTable.

**SETUP:**
1. AiTable must have 'Entity Number', 'Entity Name', 'DOS Status' fields
2. Configure SMTP credentials for alerts
3. Activate after first 10+ clients

parameters.subject: =⚠️ Entity status change detected: {{$json.entityName}}
parameters.html:
=

Entity Status Change Detected

Hi {{$json.name}},

Our daily compliance check detected a status change for your entity:

Entity: {{$json.entityName}}
Entity Number: {{$json.entityNumber}}
Previous Status: {{$json.lastKnownStatus}}
Current Status: {{$json.currentStatus}}

If this is unexpected, please contact us immediately so we can help you understand the implications and next steps.

— PA CROP Services
hello@pacropservices.com

parameters.subject: =🚨 Client entity status change: {{$json.entityName}} → {{$json.currentStatus}}
parameters.html:
=

{{$json.entityName}} ({{$json.entityNumber}}) status changed from {{$json.lastKnownStatus}} to {{$json.currentStatus}}.

Client: {{$json.name}} ({{$json.email}})

Action required: review and contact client if status is problematic.
